# Cajee Botes Orthotist & Prosthetist

> Cajee Botes Orthotist & Prosthetist provides individualised, clinician-led orthotic and prosthetic care across South Africa. Led by qualified Orthotist and Prosthetist Farida Cajee-Botes, the practice offers mobile home and hospital assessments so rehabilitation can begin early — bringing professional, assessment-led care directly to patients recovering from surgery, injury, or illness.

## About

- Practitioner: Farida Cajee-Botes, qualified Orthotist and Prosthetist
- Location: Centurion, Gauteng, South Africa (mobile home and hospital service)
- Phone: 064 652 0684 (+27 64 652 0684)
- Email: care@cajeebotes.com
- Approach: comprehensive clinical assessment, thoughtful prescription, and ongoing review — devices are prescribed on clinical need, not available stock.

## Services

- Custom Orthotics: individually designed upper- and lower-limb, spinal, and paediatric orthotic devices.
- Off-the-Shelf Orthotics: prefabricated braces and supports for injury management, post-operative recovery, and sports protection.
- Mobility Aids: crutches, walking frames, wheelchairs, transfer aids, and bathroom support.
- Medical Compression: medical-grade compression garments for lymphoedema, oedema control, scar therapy, and post-surgical recovery.
- Breast & Silicone Prosthetics: breast, facial, finger, and toe prosthetics fitted with dignity and a natural appearance.
- Upper & Lower Limb Prosthetics: prosthetic limb fitting, paediatric prosthetic care, and ongoing adjustment.

## Blog — clinician-written answers to common questions

- How much does a prosthetic leg cost in South Africa? https://www.cajeebotes.com/blog/prosthetic-leg-cost-south-africa
- Does medical aid cover prosthetics and orthotics in South Africa? https://www.cajeebotes.com/blog/medical-aid-prosthetics-orthotics-cover
- How long after an amputation can I get a prosthetic leg? https://www.cajeebotes.com/blog/how-long-after-amputation-prosthetic-leg
- How long does a prosthetic leg last? https://www.cajeebotes.com/blog/how-long-does-a-prosthetic-leg-last
- Can you walk normally with a prosthetic leg? https://www.cajeebotes.com/blog/walking-with-a-prosthetic-leg
- How much do custom orthotics cost in South Africa? https://www.cajeebotes.com/blog/custom-orthotics-cost-south-africa
- Are custom orthotics worth it? https://www.cajeebotes.com/blog/are-custom-orthotics-worth-it
- Can orthotics fix flat feet permanently? https://www.cajeebotes.com/blog/can-orthotics-fix-flat-feet
- Does my child need orthotics for flat feet? https://www.cajeebotes.com/blog/does-my-child-need-orthotics
- Do I need a referral to see an orthotist or prosthetist? https://www.cajeebotes.com/blog/referral-orthotist-prosthetist-first-visit

- Book an assessment: https://www.cajeebotes.com/contact
- Home and hospital visits available across Gauteng, South Africa.
